_comment: Data-driven formulas for derived character attributes
_format_notes: All formulas use type 'linear_combination' for this version
terms is an array of {attribute, coefficient} pairs
Mathematical interpretation: result = base_constant + sum(attribute_value x coefficient)
Attributes referenced must exist in CharacterDefinition.base_attributes
To add new derived attributes: add entries to this file and restart Godot
_extension_guide: To add a new derived attribute:
1. Add new entry below with unique key (e.g., 'critical_chance')
4. Restart Godot to load new formula

base_damage.description: Base physical damage for attacks. Formula: 5 + (strength x 0.8) + (dexterity x 0.2)

melee_damage.description: Base melee damage bonus from strength. Increased by melee weapons via equipped modifier.

ranged_damage.description: Base ranged damage bonus. Increased by ranged weapons via equipped modifier.

terms.description: Primary stat for ranged attacks (aim, precision)

armor_rating.description: Flat damage reduction applied to every incoming hit. Base 0 — entirely driven by equipped armor items. Formula: damage_final = max(1, damage - armor_rating).

armor_class.description: Armor class (defense rating) — legacy field, kept for compatibility
